name: King Arthur
title: Ruler of the Round Table
description: She didn't turn evil, not exactly—she merely revealed who she had always been deep down. A ruthless absolute monarch. She'll stop at nothing to achieve her goals, and now that she has obtained the power to bend anything and everything to her will, she is sure to take the shortest path to make a new world—her new world—become reality.

localization.name: Regal Pressure
localization.description: Grants the Super Poison status effect to 2 enemies and adds 2 Kuromoris to the very end of the allied reinforcements if there was no normal Kuromori at the very end of allied reinforcements already. Otherwise adds 1 Kuromori. Super Poison will overwrite other status effects on those enemies. Super Poison deals 4 times the damage of normal poison, and cannot be overwritten by normal poison.
localization.selected:
Super Poisons 2 enemies, adds up to 2 Kuromoris
(Will overwrite other status effects)

localization.name: Regal Fangsbane
localization.description: 500% damage to 2 enemies if they are poisoned. Heals the user for 100% of max HP if damage is dealt to a poisoned enemy.
localization.selected: 500% damage to poisoned targets and heals user

localization.name: Regal Cometflare
localization.description: 500% damage to 1 enemy if they have defeated 1+ units with attacks while on the battlefield. If the target has not defeated any units and there are any allied reinforcements, instead the last unit in the allied reinforcements is sacrificed to still deal 500% damage. This attack ignores the Counter Stance status effect, and the effects of Skin passive skills. This skill becomes locked for 50TU after use.
localization.selected: Up to 500% damage, may sacrifice 1 reinforcement

localization.name: Regal Eclipse
localization.description: Immediately defeats 1 non-boss enemy that has not defeated any units with attacks while on the battlefield, the user is considered to have defeated the target with an attack if successful. This effect ignores Revenge passive skills, Revival passive skills, any passive skills or effects of active skills that would prevent the target from being defeated, and cannot be redirected by Guardians. Usable only if the user has stored 3 Charges, and only up to 3 times per battle. Consumes all Charges on the user.
localization.selected: May immediately defeat the target, costs 3 Charges

localization.name: King's Dawn
localization.description:
This unit's Attack is increased to 1.5x.
This unit's Active Skill TU Costs are reduced by 50%.
This unit has 50% damage reduction from attacks.

All of these effects are triggered when this unit begins on the battlefield at the very start of battle, and will end if this unit leaves the battlefield. This unit cannot be sent away from the battlefield during an ally turn.

-This Attack increase does not stack with Enrage effects.
-This will not reduce TU Costs to below 1TU.
-Quicken effects will not further reduce this unit's TU costs.

localization.name: Cursed Hold Ground+
localization.description:
If this unit would be defeated, it instead survives with 1 HP and then cannot be defeated until its next turn. This effect ends after triggering once each time this unit enters the battlefield.

Whenever this unit defeats an enemy with an attack or Regal Eclipse, this unit is healed for 100% of its max HP and this Hold Ground+ effect is reset so it can trigger again.

Whenever a non-conjured enemy on the battlefield is defeated or sacrificed by any source, this unit gains 1 Charge. Certain skills are affected by and may consume charges. A unit can store a maximum of 3 charges, and all charges are removed from a unit that leaves the battlefield.

localization.name: Hammer Hunter Lv3
localization.description: 10% bonus to attacks against units equipped with Hammers.

localization.name: HP Up Lv3
localization.description: Adds 1200 to this unit's max HP.

localization.name: Greataxe Mastery
localization.description: Can use weapon skills of Greataxes in addition to their original preferred weapon type.
